name: Kinetik Holdings, Inc.
description: Kinetik is a pure-play midstream energy company strategically located in the Delaware Basin of the Permian, one of the world's fastest-growing oil and gas regions. The company provides essential gathering, compression, processing, transportation, and water management services to bring natural gas, natural gas liquids, and crude oil to market. Dedicated to operational excellence and sustainability, Kinetik serves approximately 90 producer customers and is committed to expanding its integrated network through both greenfield projects and strategic acquisitions to deliver best-in-class service and value to its stakeholders.
